breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome Eclipse Battery Shrinks: 4 Sub-Tests in March, 1 in May — Gravity Prediction Inverted
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Fresh fetch of the dome predictions page (2026-05-07) reveals only E-PRED-B ('E-PRED-B LOCKED') survives as an explicitly labeled eclipse sub-test. E-PRED-C — which predicted SG gravimeters would read 0.0 µGal during eclipse contact — has been replaced by PRED-TIER-3 predicting a 10-13 µGal positive pulse for the same instrument class at the same August 2026 eclipse. These cannot both be correct: whichever prediction is observed, the other is refuted. Our raw-text/03-predictions.txt archive preserves the 2026-03-12 four-sub-test enumeration.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Concrete, dated goalpost shift with a sign-flip on a falsifiable physical quantity (0.0 µGal → +10-13 µGal), documented in our archive, happening just 3 months before the August 2026 eclipse test.
